rule_text: Tender documents referred for Judicial Preview must be placed in public domain for one week to invite suggestions before preview decisions are issued.
verification_method: Check tender file shows 7-day public-domain publication record (URL/portal-id) prior to preview report date

rule_text: Preview of tender documents must be completed within 8 days of public-domain publication; modifications suggested by the Hon'ble Judge are binding on the Government.
verification_method: Check preview-completion date <= public-publication date + 8 days; verify all suggested modifications incorporated in final tender

rule_text: The entire Judicial Preview exercise for each tender must be completed within 15 days from the date of submission of tender documents.

AP Judicial Preview applies to 25 enumerated infrastructure sectors including Roads, Health, Water Supply, Sewerage, Public Buildings, IT Infrastructure, Power, Transport Terminus, Railways, Ports, Airports, Smart Cities, and Educational Institutions.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND EstimatedValue>=1000000000 AND Sector IN [Roads, Health, WaterSupply, Sewerage, PublicBuildings, ITInfra, Power, Transport, Railways, Ports, Airports, SmartCities, EducationalInstitutions, ...]
verification_method: Match tender sector against the 25-item Schedule; if matched and value >= 100 cr, judicial preview is mandatory
